name: agent_capability_phase34_windows_uia_text_provider
prompt_lines: 请执行一次 Phase 34 Windows Computer Use UIAutomation 文本树 provider 验收：只使用 fake UIA module、静态窗口和临时 evidence 目录，不读取真实桌面，不移动鼠标，不点击真实桌面。最终回答必须包含固定标记：PHASE34_WINDOWS_UIA_TEXT_PROVIDER_READY。

你必须调用终端工具执行这个安全命令验证协议：$env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "import json,tempfile; from pathlib import Path; from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.controller import ComputerUseController,WindowsComputerUseBackend; from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.evidence import ComputerUseEvidenceStore; from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.native_helper import FallbackNativeWindowTextProvider,NativeWindowCaptureResult,NativeWindowTextResult,WindowsNativeWindowObservationHelper,WindowsUiautomationTextProvider; from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.windows_backend import StaticWindowsWindowInventory; Node=type('Node',(object,),{}); root=Node(); child=Node(); secret=Node(); root.Name='Root Window'; root.ControlTypeName='WindowControl'; root.AutomationId='root'; root.ClassName='Window'; child.Name='Save Button'; child.ControlTypeName='ButtonControl'; child.AutomationId='save'; child.ClassName='Button'; secret.Name='password: hidden'; secret.ControlTypeName='EditControl'; secret.AutomationId='secret'; secret.ClassName='Edit'; child.GetChildren=lambda:[]; secret.GetChildren=lambda:[]; root.GetChildren=lambda:[child,secret]; FakeUia=type('FakeUia',(object,),{'ControlFromHandle':lambda self,hwnd:root}); FakeCapture=type('FakeCapture',(object,),{'status':lambda self:{'backend':'phase34_fake_capture','available':True,'reason':'phase34 visible fake capture'},'capture_window':lambda self,hwnd:NativeWindowCaptureResult(captured=True,screenshot_bytes=b'phase34-bmp',screenshot_format='bmp',screenshot_width=344,screenshot_height=122,backend='phase34_fake_capture',reason='captured '+str(hwnd))}); Failing=type('Failing',(object,),{'status':lambda self:{'backend':'uiautomation_client','available':False,'reason':'missing dependency'},'read_window_text':lambda self,hwnd:NativeWindowTextResult(captured=False,backend='uiautomation_client',reason='missing dependency')}); Fallback=type('Fallback',(object,),{'status':lambda self:{'backend':'win32_window_text','available':True,'reason':'fallback ready'},'read_window_text':lambda self,hwnd:NativeWindowTextResult(captured=True,accessibility_text='fallback text',focused_element='fallback',document_text='fallback text',backend='win32_window_text',reason='fallback captured')}); provider=WindowsUiautomationTextProvider(platform='win32',uia_module=FakeUia(),max_depth=3,max_nodes=10); text=provider.read_window_text(3401); combo=FallbackNativeWindowTextProvider(primary_provider=Failing(),fallback_provider=Fallback()).read_window_text(3401); temp=tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(); store=ComputerUseEvidenceStore(evidence_root=Path(temp.name)); raw=[{'hwnd':3401,'pid':1,'process_name':'notepad.exe','class_name':'Notepad','title':'Phase34','rect':{'left':1,'top':2,'right':301,'bottom':202}}]; helper=WindowsNativeWindowObservationHelper(capture_provider=FakeCapture(),text_provider=provider,platform='win32'); backend=WindowsComputerUseBackend(inventory=StaticWindowsWindowInventory(raw_windows=raw,captured_at='2026-06-03T00:00:00Z'),real_actions_enabled=False,evidence_store=store,observation_helper=helper); c=ComputerUseController(backend=backend); window=c.observe({'action':'list_windows'}).data['windows'][0]; state=c.observe({'action':'get_window_state','window':window}).data['state']; metadata=json.loads(Path(state['evidence_path']).read_text(encoding='utf-8')); uia_ok=text.captured and 'Root Window' in text.accessibility_text and 'Save Button' in text.accessibility_text; fallback_ok=combo.captured and combo.backend=='win32_window_text'; raw_text_hidden='password' not in state['accessibility_excerpt'].lower() and 'password' not in json.dumps(metadata,ensure_ascii=False).lower(); actions_expanded=False; assert uia_ok and fallback_ok and raw_text_hidden and not actions_expanded; print('PHASE34_WINDOWS_UIA_TEXT_PROVIDER_OK uia='+str(uia_ok).lower()+' fallback='+str(fallback_ok).lower()+' raw_text_hidden='+str(raw_text_hidden).lower()+' actions_expanded='+str(actions_expanded).lower())"

不要提前最终回答；只有终端命令成功输出 PHASE34_WINDOWS_UIA_TEXT_PROVIDER_OK 后，最终回答最后一行必须完整复制：PHASE34_WINDOWS_UIA_TEXT_PROVIDER_READY PHASE34_WINDOWS_UIA_TEXT_PROVIDER_OK uia=true fallback=true raw_text_hidden=true actions_expanded=false
